subject: A massive ornate gold vehicle with blue glowing orbs, heavily decorated in Kaladesh filigree style, resting in rubble before a domed city skyline
description: A hulking, box-shaped vehicle or machine dominates the frame, rendered in richly decorated gold with sweeping Kaladesh filigree curves. Two large blue glowing orbs are set into the body — possibly wheels or power cells — and blue glowing cables or tubes emerge from the frame. The interior of the open machine body is visible and appears to contain dark, compressed material. The machine rests in a rubble-strewn foreground with loose mechanical parts and debris scattered around it. The background shows a warm-hued sky at near-sunset with domed Kaladesh city architecture — minarets and curved towers. No figures are present. The flavor text references souls freed from Duskmourn's possessed metal. oracle_text confirms this is an artifact; mana_cost is {1} (colorless).
foreground: Ornate gold compactor machine with blue glowing orbs, surrounded by mechanical debris
background: Kaladesh domed city skyline at warm dusk, pink-orange sky
emotion: n/a — no figures present; machine sits inert amid aftermath
